ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bike_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "cnt" INTEGER /* Count of bikes rented */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season (1-4) when the data was collected */,
  "holiday" INTEGER /* Whether the day was a holiday (0/1) */,
  "weekday" INTEGER /* Day of the week (0-6) when the data was collected */,
  "workingday" INTEGER /* Whether the day was a working day (0/1) */,
  "weathersit" INTEGER /* Weather situation (1-4) when the data was collected */,
  "temp" REAL /* Temperature when the data was collected */,
  "atemp" REAL /* Feeling temperature when the data was collected */,
  "hum" REAL /* Humidity when the data was collected */,
  "windspeed" REAL /* Wind speed when the data was collected */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was collected */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location or station */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., casual, registered) */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific bike used */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the bike rental in minutes */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance traveled by the bike in kilometers */,
  "weather_description" TEXT /* Detailed weather description */,
  "atmospheric_pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure when the data was collected */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation when the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction entry */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season (1-4) for the predicted data */,
  "holiday" INTEGER /* Whether the predicted day is a holiday (0/1) */,
  "weekday" INTEGER /* Day of the week (0-6) for the predicted data */,
  "workingday" INTEGER /* Whether the predicted day is a working day (0/1) */,
  "weathersit" INTEGER /* Weather situation (1-4) for the predicted data */,
  "temp" REAL /* Temperature for the predicted data */,
  "atemp" REAL /* Feeling temperature for the predicted data */,
  "hum" REAL /* Humidity for the predicted data */,
  "windspeed" REAL /* Wind speed for the predicted data */,
  "predicted_cnt" INTEGER /* Predicted count of bikes rented */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction was made */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location or station */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the machine learning model used for the prediction */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score for the prediction */,
  "predicted_duration" REAL /* Predicted average duration of bike rentals */,
  "predicted_distance" REAL /* Predicted average distance traveled by bikes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location or station */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location or station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "total_bikes" INTEGER /* Total number of bikes at the location */,
  "available_bikes" INTEGER /* Number of available bikes at the location */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)
